title: Web Developer (Remote)
description:
**About The Company**
 Allied Container Group is a prominent logistics and supply chain management company headquartered in Singapore, with a strong presence across the Asia\\-Pacific (APAC) and Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) regions. With nearly five decades of industry experience, we have established ourselves as a trusted provider of comprehensive logistics solutions. Our services encompass trucking, container haulage, depot yard operations, warehousing, distribution, and freight forwarding, catering to a diverse range of businesses from small enterprises to large corporations. We pride ourselves on leveraging innovative technology and artificial intelligence through our dedicated in\\-house tech team to enhance operational efficiency, develop advanced software and hardware solutions, and stay ahead in the competitive logistics landscape.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a skilled Web Developer to join our Technology \\& Operations team. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and maintaining cutting\\-edge web applications that support our core business operations. Your work will involve collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to identify requirements, define project scope, and ensure timely delivery of high\\-quality solutions. The ideal candidate will have a passion for innovation, a strong understanding of full\\-stack development, and the ability to work independently and as part of a dynamic team. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to the digital transformation of a leading logistics company and to develop solutions that directly impact our operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess at least two years of hands\\-on experience in full\\-stack web development, with proficiency in React, Laravel, React Native, HTML, CSS, and related JavaScript/PHP frameworks. Familiarity with databases, code versioning tools such as Git or SVN, and web server environments like Apache or Nginx is essential. A fundamental understanding of the software development lifecycle, UI/UX principles, and experience with CI/CD pipelines and cloud services such as AWS, Azure, or DigitalOcean is highly desirable. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field, or demonstrate equivalent professional experience. Additional familiarity with OCR frameworks, system testing, and automated testing will be considered advantageous. The ability to communicate effectively in Hindi and/or Arabic, along with a willingness to relocate to Dubai or Oman after a probation period, is preferred. Candidates must demonstrate problem\\-solving capabilities, adaptability to diverse working environments, and a keen interest in automation, artificial intelligence, and innovative research to solve complex business challenges.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Your primary responsibilities will include developing, automating, and maintaining web applications and services aligned with business and operational goals. You will work closely with the team lead and colleagues to gather requirements, define project scope, and ensure adherence to deadlines and quality standards. Collaborating with UI/UX designers to maintain consistency in design and user experience is vital. You will be responsible for documenting product features, project details, and technical specifications to facilitate ongoing maintenance and future enhancements. Staying abreast of emerging trends and technologies in web development will enable you to bring innovative solutions to the company. Additionally, you will liaise with yard staff, operations, and accounts teams to ensure seamless integration of web applications into existing workflows, providing technical support and troubleshooting as needed. Your role may also involve participating in depot system rollouts, traveling to regional sites, and working closely with onsite teams to ensure successful deployment and adoption of new systems.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Allied Container Group offers a competitive compensation package along with comprehensive benefits designed to support your professional growth and personal well\\-being. You will have opportunities for career advancement within a global organization committed to innovation and excellence. The company promotes a collaborative and inclusive work environment, fostering continuous learning and development. As part of our team, you will gain exposure to cutting\\-edge technologies and industry best practices. Additionally, we provide support for relocation, training, and professional certifications, ensuring you have the resources needed to succeed and thrive in your role.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Allied Container Group is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment where diversity is valued and all employees are treated with respect and fairness. We do not discriminate based on race, gender, age, religion, national origin, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce fosters innovation, enhances collaboration, and drives our success. We encourage qualified candidates from all backgrounds to apply and join our dynamic team dedicated to transforming the logistics industry through technology and innovation.

title: Software Engineer (Full-stack Developer)
description:
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**
 At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.
   

  

 Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real\\-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are actively searching for a talented and forward\\-thinking Full\\-stack developer to join our team. As a key member of our organization, you will play a vital role in the development and maintenance of our cloud\\-based solutions. Your primary responsibility will involve solving complex problems by leveraging your expertise in multiple technologies. Additionally, you will collaborate closely with our DevOps team to ensure seamless feature deployment in production environments. If you are deeply passionate about cloud technologies and excited to contribute to cutting\\-edge solutions, we enthusiastically invite you to join our team.
   

  

**What about the FSxN Workload Factory for Databases engineering team?**
 Workload Factory for Databases revolutionizes the deployment and management of database instances or clusters with NetApp's recommended best practices. Through the intuitive Workload Factory UI, users can effortlessly create and manage their entire database environment. This comprehensive solution covers every aspect, including VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) setup, subnets, Active Directory integration, FSx for ONTAP configuration, and EC2 instances with SQL deployment.
   

  

 Not only does Workload Factory enable the creation of new environments, but it also offers the flexibility to utilize existing customer environments by selecting the desired VPC, Active Directory, and FSxN settings. The deployment is exclusively supported on AWS (Amazon Web Services), leveraging its capabilities as a first\\-party cloud provider for FSxN.
   

  

 With Workload Factory, users can deploy, manage, and protect their databases seamlessly, adhering to built\\-in best practices for optimization. It automates thin cloning, facilitates storage\\-level disaster recovery, and provides robust monitoring and resolution capabilities for database health issues. This end\\-to\\-end solution empowers users to streamline their database operations while ensuring efficiency, reliability, and data protection.
   

  

 Job Requirements
   

  

**Roles \\& Responsibilities**
* Develop, test, and automate cloud\\-native applications and services using TypeScript, Nodejs.
* Develop, test, and automate cloud\\-native applications and services using front\\-end technologies like ReactJS/JavaScript/HTML.
* Strong in Data Structures and algorithms.
* Expertise in cloud technologies, containers, orchestration frameworks like Kubernetes.
* Should have a good storage and networking background and a good understanding of those concepts.
* Should be very versatile with Windows/UNIX OS, its technologies and understanding.
* Good understanding of REST API design and implementation.
* Knowledge of one of databases (MSSQL, Oracle \\& PostgreSQL).
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code to solve complex problems and improve system performance.
* Participate in code reviews, knowledge sharing sessions, and contribute to the improvement of development processes.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to understand requirements and design scalable and secure cloud solutions.
* Work closely with the SRE (Site Reliability Engineering) team to ensure smooth feature deployment in production environments.
* Utilize AI (Artificial Intelligence) tools like Copilot and Cursor to enhance productivity in automation, development, documentation, and unit test writing.
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to cloud infrastructure, performance, and security.
* Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry trends to continuously improve cloud\\-based solutions.
* Should have participated in all phases of the product development cycle from Requirement understanding, Design, through Implementation and Test design.
* Should have attained experience and knowledge in solving complex problems.
* Prior experience in developing high scale and performant systems.
* Should have strong aptitude to learn new technologies.


**Preferred Skills:**
* Experience with other programming languages, such as NodeJS (TypeScript), Golang or Java technologies along with PowerShell.
* Knowledge of database technologies (e.g. Oracle, SQL, PostgreSQL) and data storage solutions.
* Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools (e.g., Kibana, ELK stack).
* Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies and DevOps principles.
* Certifications in cloud technologies (e.g., AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner) would be a plus.


 Education
   

  

* Master's/bachelor's degree in a relevant field (e.g. Computer Science, Engineering)
* Typically requires a minimum of 4\\-8 years of related experience.


 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in\\-office and/or in\\-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise\\-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment \\- make your next move your best one. Apply now.

 We are seeking an experienced and highly skilled software engineer at the tech lead level to join our innovative project focused on building evaluation and training datasets for large language models in software engineering. This role involves hands\\-on development, environment automation, issue triaging, and evaluating test coverage and quality across various open\\-source repositories. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of high\\-quality public GitHub repositories, proficiency in programming languages such as C\\#, and familiarity with modern software development tools like Git and Docker. This position offers a unique opportunity to contribute to groundbreaking AI research by working closely with researchers to identify complex repositories and challenging issues for LLM evaluation. Leadership opportunities are available for candidates interested in guiding junior engineers and collaborating across teams to achieve project goals.
   

  

**Qualifications**

**Benefits**

title: Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Convin is a leading Conversation Intelligence platform developed by IIT Delhi alumni to revolutionize sales, collections, and customer experience. Leveraging proprietary AI and automation technologies, Convin enables enterprises to analyze conversations, derive actionable insights, enhance conversion rates, and deliver exceptional customer interactions. The company's innovative solutions have positioned it as a trusted partner for top\\-tier brands across various industries, including EdTech, FinTech, HealthTech, Hospitality, Travel, and BPO sectors. Convin’s commitment to excellence and continuous innovation has earned recognition on prominent platforms such as LinkedIn's Top Startups list and ranking among the Top 20 Software Companies in India by G2\\. The company has successfully raised significant funding, including $6\\.5 million in Series\\-A funding in 2024 and $2\\.1 million in seed funding in 2022, fueling its growth and technological advancements.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a dedicated and detail\\-oriented Quality Assurance Engineer to join our dynamic team at Convin. This on\\-site position in India offers an exciting opportunity to work closely with our founders and senior leadership in a fast\\-paced, high\\-growth environment. As a Quality Assurance Engineer, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the quality, performance, and reliability of our AI\\-driven SaaS products. You will be responsible for designing and executing comprehensive testing strategies, automating test processes, and collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to deliver top\\-notch solutions to our enterprise clients. This role provides a unique platform for professional growth, allowing you to gain hands\\-on experience in cutting\\-edge AI and enterprise technology while contributing directly to the success of a rapidly expanding company.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a strong foundation in quality assurance principles, automation testing, and software development. Candidates should have 2\\-3 years of relevant experience in QA or related fields, with proficiency in automation tools like Selenium. A solid command of programming languages such as Python or Java is essential for writing and maintaining test scripts. Familiarity with QA management tools like JIRA, TestRail, or similar platforms is required. The candidate must demonstrate keen attention to detail, problem\\-solving skills, and a thorough understanding of SDLC and agile methodologies. A bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related technical field is mandatory, or current enrollment in such a program. Passion for learning, adaptability, and excellent communication and collaboration skills are highly valued for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Conduct manual and automated testing to validate product functionality, performance, and stability, ensuring high\\-quality deliverables.
* Design, develop, and maintain detailed test plans, test cases, and scripts that cover all aspects of the product features and workflows.
* Log, track, and manage bugs and issues using issue tracking tools like JIRA; collaborate effectively with developers to facilitate timely resolution.
* Build and maintain automated test scripts using Selenium integrated with programming languages such as Python or Java to streamline testing processes.
* Perform regression testing, performance testing, and user acceptance testing (UAT) for every product release to ensure optimal quality.
* Work closely with product managers, developers, and designers to understand requirements and provide continuous feedback on quality and usability.
* Analyze QA processes regularly, identify bottlenecks, and recommend improvements to enhance testing efficiency and accuracy.


**Benefits**
* Learning \\& Upskilling: Reimbursement of up to 1,000 per month (up to 12,000 annually) towards books, courses, or certifications related to professional development.
* Wellness \\& Leisure Allowance: An annual allowance of 24,000 to support personal travel, retreats, gym memberships, or wellness activities, claimable quarterly or yearly.
* Comprehensive Insurance: Health insurance coverage of 5,00,000 for self and family, along with accident coverage of 25,00,000, ensuring peace of mind.
* Friday Treats: Weekly in\\-office snacks to foster team bonding and morale.
* Friday Fun \\& Wellness: Bi\\-monthly activities including yoga sessions, health check\\-ups, learning workshops, and cultural events to promote well\\-being and team engagement.
* Quarterly Team Outings: Organized retreats and social events to encourage team bonding, relaxation, and collaborative growth.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Convin is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We believe that diverse perspectives and backgrounds drive innovation and excellence. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, regardless of race, gender, ethnicity, religion, disability, or sexual orientation. Our hiring decisions are based solely on merit, skills, and qualifications, ensuring a fair and equitable process for all applicants. We are dedicated to creating a work environment where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their best.

description:
**About The Company**
 Indium is a leading technology solutions provider dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable software services to clients across various industries. With a strong focus on leveraging cutting\\-edge technologies, Indium strives to empower organizations through digital transformation, enhancing operational efficiency and driving growth. Our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction has established us as a trusted partner in the IT landscape, fostering a collaborative environment that nurtures talent and promotes continuous learning.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Software Engineer specializing in API development and backend technologies to join our dynamic team at Indium. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable API endpoints using frameworks such as Flask, Django, or FastAPI. This role requires a deep understanding of asynchronous programming, data manipulation, and database management to support our innovative products and services. The candidate will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams to deliver high\\-quality solutions that meet business requirements and adhere to best practices in software development.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate should possess a minimum of 8\\-10 years of comprehensive experience in the IT industry, with a strong background in backend development and API management. Proficiency in Python and related frameworks such as Flask, Django, or FastAPI is essential. Hands\\-on experience with asynchronous programming using Asynch.io, and familiarity with data processing libraries like NumPy and Pandas, is required. Basic knowledge of database systems such as Postgres and MongoDB is necessary, along with experience working with cloud storage solutions like S3 and AWS. Additionally, familiarity with API management tools like Postman or Mulesoft, and understanding of gRPC protocols, will be advantageous. The candidate should demonstrate excellent problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work effectively in a hybrid work environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain robust API endpoints using Flask, Django, or FastAPI frameworks.
* Implement asynchronous programming techniques to optimize application performance and scalability.
* Collaborate with product managers, frontend developers, and other stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver technical solutions.
* Ensure API security, reliability, and performance through best practices and regular testing.
* Integrate with various data sources, including relational and NoSQL databases such as Postgres and MongoDB.
* Manage cloud storage and services, particularly AWS S3, to support data storage and retrieval needs.
* Utilize API management tools like Postman or Mulesoft to streamline testing and deployment processes.
* Implement gRPC protocols for efficient communication between distributed systems.
* Participate in code reviews, documentation, and knowledge sharing to promote best practices within the team.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends to continuously improve existing systems and processes.


**Benefits**
 Indium offers a competitive benefits package that includes comprehensive health insurance, retirement plans, and paid time off. Employees have access to ongoing training and professional development programs to enhance their skills and career growth. We foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment that encourages innovation and recognizes individual contributions. Additionally, our hybrid work model provides flexibility to balance work and personal life, promoting overall well\\-being and job satisfaction.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Indium is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse perspectives and experiences drive innovation and are essential for our continued success. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates who are eager to contribute to our mission and grow with us.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**
 At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.
   

  

 Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real\\-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 As a Senior Software Engineer you will work as part of a team of skilled engineers accountable for participating in the entire lifecycle of the products including design, development, maintenance \\& testing. As part of this function, you will build a deep working knowledge of core NetApp technologies, cloud technologies, storage systems and more. You will also actively participate in the coding and design process right from incubation to completion of the product. You will participate in technical discussions within the immediate group and across functions, where evaluating and executing design and development plans for products are reviewed. You will be guided by senior members of the team in building and architecting cloud\\-scale products that will be used by thousands of customers.
   

  

 Job Requirements
   

  

* Strong technical knowledge across the three hyper scalars.
* Customer focused with good analytical, logical and problem\\-solving skills.
* Focused on innovation and product quality.
* Strong programming skills in Go/Golang
* Strong development using Microservices architecture and Docker/Kubernetes.
* Experience in developing services in any of the major cloud providers preferred.
* Full Stack developer preferred.
* Should have a good storage and networking background and understanding of concepts around the same.
* Should be very versatile with Linux or Other UNIX OS, its technologies and understanding.
* Good understanding of REST API design and implementation.
* Should have attained experience and knowledge in solving complex problems.
* Should have strong aptitude to learn new technologies.
* Should be a good team player who collaborates within and outside the team.


 Education
   

  

* A BTech/BE in Computer Science or Electrical Engineering, a Master’s degree, or equivalent experience with 8 to 12 years of experience.


 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in\\-office and/or in\\-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise\\-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment \\- make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Senior Software Engineer, BizTech
description:
Airbnb was born in 2007 when two hosts welcomed three guests to their San Francisco home, and has since grown to over 5 million hosts who have welcomed over 2 billion guest arrivals in almost every country across the globe. Every day, hosts offer unique stays and experiences that make it possible for guests to connect with communities in a more authentic way.
   

  

**The Community You Will Join**
 The CRM Engineering team builds world\\-class tools that drive growth and foster meaningful relationships between Airbnb and its community, including Hosts, Guests, Law Enforcement, Government Regulators, Local Community Leaders, and more. This team tackles some of the most challenging and unique problems faced by our business. Here are a few examples:
   

  

* Growth Platform: Designed to increase supply and retain existing hosts.
* Policy Platform: Enables Airbnb to engage with regulatory bodies across the globe regarding short\\-term rental regulations. This platform tracks regulations that impact the Airbnb business and provides intelligence to address unique business challenges.
* Community Platform: Establishes a social platform to drive community enablement, collaboration, and success.
* Agent Tools: Empowers agents to understand and resolve issues that customers are unable to address on their own.
* Aircover Claims Platform: Facilitates the processing of claims for Aircover insurance products, offering protection to both hosts and guests.


**The Difference You Will Make**
 The Community Platform team is building a groundbreaking social platform aimed at delivering a differentiated service to our community. This platform will empower local communities to collaborate, support community leaders, host local and global events, provide improved resources, drive engagement, mobilize the community, and offer direct feedback to Airbnb.
   

  

 We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Full Stack engineer who is passionate about making a difference through their work. You will play a significant role in shaping the technical vision and then delivering a solution that is flexible, efficient and scales with the needs of the business. Each individual brings their own unique skill set, experiences, thought leadership and technical expertise to solve these technical challenges for Airbnb.
   

  

**A Typical Day**
* Work cross\\-functionally with product, design, and other engineering counterparts to execute on product and business strategy to build novel products and features
* Drive, lead, and contribute to the full development cycle: technical design, development, test, experimentation, analysis, and launch.
* You’ll be reviewing code and design docs, giving feedback on product specs and mocks.
* Provide critical input in team roadmap and technical direction.


**Your Expertise**
* 6\\+ years of full software development experience
* Proficient in at least one major programming language (preferably Java / Kotlin / Scala / Ruby on Rails / Python).
* Passion for delivering products end\\-to\\-end: from ideation through planning and scoping to implementation and experimental A/B testing.
* Exposure to architectural patterns of large, high\\-scale web applications, such as well\\-designed APIs, high volume data pipelines, and efficient algorithms.
* Passionate about design and building UX products. You bring flexibility to collaboration with design and product partners by presenting tradeoffs and iterating to the ideal solution.
* Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills and detail oriented.
* Bachelor’s and/or Master’s degree, preferably in CS, or equivalent experience.

title: Founding Software Engineer (Full Stack | AI-Accelerated)
description:

 This is not a typical developer role.
 



  





 We are looking for a founding engineer who can think like a builder, work like an owner, and use AI as a speed multiplier, not as a crutch.
 



  





**You should be someone who:** 




 \\- likes solving messy problems
 



 \\- takes ownership without waiting for instructions
 



 \\- is proactive and thinks ahead
 



 \\- can suggest what should be done, not just do what is assigned

**WHAT YOU WILL DO:** 




 \\- Own and improve core system flows end\\-to\\-end

 \\- Identify problems before they become blockers

 \\- Work directly with the founder to build and shape the company
 



  





**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:** 




 \\- Improve session, offer, coupon, redirect, order, and attribution systems

 \\- Strong ownership mindset
 



 \\- Very proactive attitude

 \\- Visionary thinking with practical delivery
 



 \\- Hungry to learn and open to new ideas
 



 \\- Loyal, long\\-term mindset
 



 \\- Comfortable with messy systems and fast environments

  “This should already be fixed”

  “Here is what we should do next”
 



  





**TECHNICAL EXPECTATIONS:**

**You should know how things work without AI too:**

**WHO SHOULD APPLY:** 




 Someone who is:

**HOW TO APPLY:**

title: Remote Software Engineer (Ruby)
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is one of the world’s fastest\\-growing AI companies dedicated to accelerating the development and deployment of advanced artificial intelligence systems. With a focus on innovative research and practical applications, Turing aims to revolutionize the way AI interacts with real\\-world problems, particularly in software engineering. The company fosters a dynamic environment where talented professionals collaborate on cutting\\-edge projects that push the boundaries of AI capabilities. As a leader in the AI industry, Turing is committed to building impactful solutions that enhance productivity, efficiency, and technological progress across various domains.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our innovative team working on large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. The primary focus of this role is to contribute to the development of verifiable software engineering tasks based on public repository histories, employing a synthetic, human\\-in\\-the\\-loop approach. This position involves hands\\-on software engineering work, including automating development environments, triaging issues, and evaluating test coverage and quality across diverse open\\-source projects. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in analyzing complex codebases, setting up and modifying code repositories, and collaborating with research teams to improve LLM performance in software engineering tasks. This role offers an exciting opportunity to influence the future of AI\\-assisted software development by working at the intersection of software engineering and AI research.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering, with a proven track record working with public code repositories. Proficiency in at least one programming language such as Ruby is essential, along with a solid understanding of Git, Docker, and basic software pipeline setup. Candidates should be comfortable navigating and understanding complex codebases, running and modifying projects locally, and assessing code quality and test coverage. Experience with open\\-source contributions or evaluations is highly desirable. Additional qualifications include strong problem\\-solving skills, the ability to work independently and collaboratively, and excellent communication skills. Prior participation in LLM research or automation tool development is a plus but not mandatory.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a key member of our team, your responsibilities will include analyzing and triaging issues across trending open\\-source libraries hosted on GitHub, ensuring efficient issue resolution and repository health. You will set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and environment management, to facilitate testing and evaluation. Your role will involve evaluating unit test coverage and quality, running codebases locally, and modifying them to assess LLM performance in bug\\-fixing and other software engineering scenarios. You will collaborate closely with research teams to identify repositories and issues that challenge LLMs, contributing to dataset creation and refinement. There will also be opportunities to lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative and innovative work environment.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Joining Turing provides the opportunity to work remotely in a flexible environment, enabling you to balance professional growth with personal commitments. You will engage in cutting\\-edge AI projects alongside industry\\-leading LLM companies, gaining valuable experience at the forefront of AI research and software engineering. The role offers competitive project\\-based compensation, with flexible time commitments tailored to your availability—whether 20, 30, or 40 hours per week. You will also have access to a global network of talented professionals, continuous learning opportunities, and the chance to make a meaningful impact on the future of AI\\-powered software development.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees and applicants. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to providing an equitable workplace where everyone has the opportunity to succeed. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, religion, disability, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse perspectives drive innovation and excellence, and we are committed to creating a welcoming environment for all talent to thrive.

 At Harvey, we’re transforming how legal and professional services operate — not incrementally, but end\\-to\\-end. By combining frontier agentic AI, an enterprise\\-grade platform, and deep domain expertise, we’re reshaping how critical knowledge work gets done for decades to come.

**Role Overview**
 The Developer Experience team is what keeps Harvey’s fast growth momentum possible — the kind of fast where every week brings new products, new capabilities, and new challenges. We build the CI/CD systems, internal frameworks, and platform\\-level guardrails that enable all Harvey engineers to ship ambitious AI features rapidly and safely.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer on the Developer Experience team, you will be responsible for creating frameworks and systems that maximize the velocity and efficiency of every engineer at Harvey. You'll also have a unique opportunity to apply AI directly to the problem of developer productivity, defining the future of software development within an AI\\-native company.
   

  

 If you are passionate about building foundational platforms to enable other engineers to move fast with confidence, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**What You'll Do**

**What You Have**

* Hands\\-on experience with CI/CD systems (Builtekite, Github Actions), test frameworks, or load and performance testing.
* Hands\\-on experience with container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) and infrastructure as code (Pulumi, Terraform).
* A track record of producing high\\-quality, well\\-tested code, consistently following software development best practices to ensure quality and reliability.
* Proven technical leadership throughout the entire project lifecycle, including ideation, design, implementation, and productionization.
* Experience mentoring engineers, guiding architectural decisions, and shaping culture to foster engineering excellence.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and a passion for improving developer experience — you enjoy creating tools or frameworks that make other engineers more productive
* Excellent collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to work across teams and incorporate feedback.
* Experience integrating AI agents into a developer ecosystem is a strong plus.
